app.name: VALIDIKA
app.tagline: Verification of pharmacists in the DRC

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

home.welcomeSubtitle: Search, verify and inspect the cryptographic proofs of licensed pharmacists in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

placeholder.title: Coming soon
placeholder.candidacyBody: Submitting an application from the mobile app is coming in a future update. You can already apply from the VALIDIKA website.

auth.registerSubtitle: Join VALIDIKA in a few seconds
auth.name: Full name
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email address.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully. You can now sign in.

verify.title: Public verification
verify.inputLabel: QR token, license number or ordinal number
verify.scanInstructions: Place the pharmacist's QR code inside the frame.
verify.resultNotFound: No resource found for this code.
verify.resultCompromised: Compromised proof: the data does not match the stored signature.

account.title: My account
account.notLoggedIn: Sign in to access your profile and applications.
account.logoutConfirmBody: You will need to sign in again to access your account.
account.noCandidacies: You haven't submitted any application yet.

candidacy.title: Submit a candidacy
candidacy.subtitle: Join the registry of licensed pharmacists in the DRC in a few minutes.
candidacy.scanCta: Scan a document (professional card, diploma, ID)
candidacy.scanSuccess: Name pre-filled from the scanned document. Please verify before sending.
candidacy.scanEmpty: No information could be recognized automatically. Please fill in manually.
candidacy.submitSuccess: Candidacy submitted successfully! You can track its status in your account.
